extension.summary: Manage Arr media and Bazarr subtitles from Kodi.
extension.description: Kodi-native Request & Search, interactive Radarr/Sonarr release selection, service dashboard, monitoring, queue, Bazarr subtitle download, deletion, exclusion and replacement controls.
extension.news: Add Request & Search, interactive Arr release selection, a bounded dashboard and Kodi-native Bazarr subtitles. Harden Android Kodi episode identity, international-title matching, subtitle language variants and single-use downloads; enable dry run by default for new installs.
